en: Do you know how to use this English word? Update, update.
ko: 이 영어 단어 어떻게 쓰는지 알아? Update

en: It's a verb that means to make something more modern or to add the newest information to it.
ko: update. 무언가를 더 현대적으로 만들거나 최신 정보를 추가하다라는 뜻의 동사야. 예문

en: Here's an example. Update my blog.
Update my blog. I'll update my blog with a new recipe.
I'll update my blog with a new recipe.
I'll update my blog with a new Moroccan spice recipe.
ko: 새 모로코 향신료 레시피로 블로그를 업데이트할 거야

en: Update your wardrobe too or fans will think you only cook.
ko: 옷장도 업데이트해, 안 그러면 팬들이 요리만 한다고 생각할걸. 복습하자

en: Let's review. Say this out loud.
Update my blog. Update my blog.
I'll update my blog with a new recipe.
I'll update my blog with a new recipe. Great job.
Follow English Class 101 for more English lessons.
